title: How the spiraling Iran conflict could affect data centers and electricity costs
summary: The escalating Iran conflict threatens data center operations and could increase electricity costs by disrupting energy trade through the Strait of Hormuz, which handles 20 percent of global energy commerce.
content:
A commercial ship is viewed anchored off the coast of the United Arab Emirates, in the Strait of Hormuz, Dubai, on March 2nd, 2026. Increased maritime traffic led to a buildup of vessels waiting near Dubai, highlighting the strategic importance of the strait, which handles 20 percent of global energy trade. | Photo: Getty Images	

Soon after the Trump administration launched its war on Iran, I called up Reed Blakemore, director of research and programs at the Atlantic Council Global Energy Center, to talk about the consequences. While oil and gas prices were already on the rise, there was still more hope then that the impact of the conflict might be short-lived. At the end of our conversation, Blakemore said plainly: "Let's have a call again [next week] … We'll have a much clearer picture of what the conflict is going to look like and what the story really is going to be for energy moving forward." 

 Energy infrastructure has become a key leverage point in the unfold …

title: I’ve tested the latest Switch 2 controllers, and this one is the best
summary: A comprehensive guide to Nintendo Switch 2 controllers identifies third-party alternatives that match or exceed Nintendo's Pro Controller features at lower prices with superior joystick durability.
content:
If you choose to get an extra controller for your Nintendo Switch 2, you can spend a lot — and get a lot in return. Buying Nintendo’s own $89 Switch 2 Pro Controller, for instance, will net you the console’s only wireless controller with a 3.5mm headphone jack for private listening, not to mention great-feeling rumble and a slick design. It’s not perfect, but it’s otherwise the total package in terms of features. 
But it’d be a disservice to you to call it a day there. There are several third-party models that are cheaper, yet don’t make too many compromises in terms of features. In fact, there’s now an affordable option that replicates the Switch 2 Pro’s OS-level rear button customization on a per-game basis, which was previously exclusive to Nintendo’s first-party gamepad. I’ve spent time testing a handful of these gamepads, including new ones as they release, and there’s a small batch of models that I think will satisfy most people, with a range of styles, prices, and features.
Every controller I’ve included in this guide is compatible with both the Switch 2 and the original Switch (all of them can remotely wake the Switch 2), as well as PC. Each offering also includes better, longer-lasting joystick technology than you’ll get with Nintendo’s flagship controller; the Switch 2 Pro Controller’s potentiometer-based joysticks are prone to degradation over time, after all, but our picks include either Hall effect or TMR joysticks. I’ve highlighted any controller-specific perks in the blurbs below.

Despite being designed for Xbox consoles, the esports-inspired headset can connect wirelessly to your PC, phone, tablet, Nintendo Switch 2, and other devices via Bluetooth or the included USB-C wireless dongle (with a USB-C–to–USB-A adapter), which allows for low-latency wireless audio while gaming. The headset additionally features large 50mm drivers designed to deliver clear sound, along with a detachable boom mic for chatting with your friends. Razer also includes a volume knob and mic mute button on the earcup, along with a SmartSwitch button that lets you switch audio profiles, making it easy to adjust settings while in the middle of a game.
Weighing less than a pound, the headset is fairly lightweight as well and adjustable, so it can fit a range of head sizes. It also uses breathable memory foam ear cushions that help block out background noises and make the headset comfortable to wear for a long period of time. Battery life is also great, with Razer claiming it can last up to 70 hours on a single charge, so you don’t have to worry about charging it every day. And when you do need to top it up, it charges relatively fast via USB-C.

title: Grammarly will keep using authors’ identities without permission unless they opt out
summary: Grammarly's Expert Review feature used famous journalists' names to validate AI suggestions without their permission, forcing them to opt out rather than receiving prior consent. The company refused to apologize or remove the feature, instead offering an opt-out mechanism.
content:
Last week, my colleagues discovered that Superhuman's Grammarly had turned me into an AI editor, using my real name, without ever asking my permission. They did the same to my boss Nilay Patel, my colleagues David Pierce and Tom Warren, and - as Wired initially reported last Wednesday - many authors far more famous than us. Grammarly's new "Expert Review" feature uses our names to give its AI suggestions credibility that they don't deserve. 
Now, Grammarly has finally addressed the backlash - but not by apologizing, and not by walking the feature back. For now, it will graciously give us the chance to opt out of something we didn't know it  …

title: The best Mario Day deals we found
summary: Nintendo-related products are on sale during Mario Day (March 10), including Switch 2 games, microSD cards, and controllers, with most deals expiring March 15. The sales span multiple retailers including Amazon, Best Buy, Walmart, and Costco.
content:
It’s Mario Day, an annual celebration of Nintendo’s mascot. It falls every year on March 10th because the date spells out “MAR10,” but you probably knew that already. Even if you aren’t all that into Mario — good luck avoiding him with the upcoming Super Mario Galaxy movie — it’s an opportunity to save on all sorts of Nintendo-related games and gear throughout the week. title: Nvidia’s DLSS 4.5 with 6x Frame Generation is rolling out at the end of March
summary: Nvidia announced DLSS 4.5 with 6x Multi Frame Generation arriving March 31 for RTX 50-series GPUs, generating five additional frames per native frame compared to the previous limit of three. The company also added Dynamic Frame Generation for automatic frame rate optimization.
content:
Nvidia's DLSS 4.5 with 6x Multi Frame Generation will be available starting March 31st for users with RTX 50-series GPUs, the company announced on Tuesday. With 6x Multi Frame Generation, Nvidia claims that DLSS 4.5 can generate "five additional frames for every single natively rendered one, for a maximum 6X multiplier." It's an increase from the maximum of three additional frames possible with DLSS 4.
On March 31st, Nvidia will also release Dynamic Frame Generation for 50-series GPUs, which can automatically switch between Multi Frame Generation multipliers to hit your target frame rate for a game or your display's refresh rate.

title: The gym-friendly Beats Powerbeats Pro 2 are 20 percent off right now
summary: The Beats Powerbeats Pro 2 fitness earbuds are discounted 20 percent to $199.95 across multiple retailers, marking their second-best price ever. The earbuds feature heart rate monitoring, improved earhooks, and wireless charging for athletes and fitness enthusiasts.
content:
Beats may have recently redesigned the Beats Fit Pro to be more comfortable and secure, but the company’s latest offering is still no match for its other pair of fitness-centric earbuds: the Powerbeats Pro 2. Luckily, the latter in-ears are on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for around $199.95 ($50 off), their second-best price to date.
Beats Powerbeats Pro 2

Where to Buy:

 $249 $199.95 at Walmart
 $249 $199.95 at Amazon
 $249.99 $199.99 at Best Buy

As you might have guessed, the Powerbeats Pro 2 have been one of our favorite pairs of earbuds for sports and working out since they arrived on the scene early last year. They feature smaller, more comfortable earhooks than the prior model and boast wireless charging, along with an array of updated microphones that do a great job masking unwanted noise while listening to music and taking calls. Their marquee feature, however, is their heart rate monitoring, which leverages built-in sensors on each earbud and integrates well with apps from Nike, Runna, Open, Peloton, and others. Unsurprisingly, you can also quickly view various metrics in Apple Fitness Plus, such as heart rate and calories burned.
Like other Beats earbuds, the noise-canceling Powerbeats Pro 2 are also platform-agnostic, at least to a degree. They do support a handful of Apple-only features — most notably, dynamic head tracking for spatial audio, hands-free Siri access, and Find My integration — but Android users do get a subset of features, including one-touch pairing and some simple customization when it comes to controls. Sadly, though, they only carry an IPX4 rating, which falls short of the IP57 rating found on Apple’s newer AirPods Pro 3. That means that, while water- and sweat-resistant, they don’t offer any dust resistance.
Nonetheless, when you pair the Pro 2 with all the features you do get — as well as their easy-to-use physical controls and terrific transparency mode — you’re left with a well-rounded pair of fitness earbuds that should

content:
Meta’s Oversight Board wants the company to start taking AI labeling seriously to protect its users from online misinformation. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

Meta's methods for identifying deepfakes are "not robust or comprehensive enough" to handle how quickly misinformation spreads during armed conflicts like the Iran war. That's according to the Meta Oversight Board - a semi-independent body that guides the company's content moderation practices - which is now calling on Meta to overhaul how it surfaces and labels AI-generated content across Facebook, Instagram, and Threads.
The call for action stems from an investigation into a fake AI video of alleged damage to buildings in Israel that was shared on Meta's social platforms last year, but the Board says its recommendations are particularly r …

title: You Could Be Next
summary: Mercor recruits unemployed workers to create AI training data by conducting interviews with an AI system, creating a paradox where workers displaced by AI now train the systems replacing them. The practice highlights how economic desperation exploits vulnerable workers in the AI era.
content:
The LinkedIn post seemed like yet another scam job offer, but Katya was desperate enough to click. After college, she’d struggled to make a living as a freelance journalist, gone to grad school, then pivoted to what she hoped would be a more stable career in content marketing — only to find AI had automated much of the work. This company was called Crossing Hurdles, and it promised copywriting jobs starting at $45 per hour.
Katya clicked and was taken to a page for another company, called Mercor, where she was instructed to interview on-camera with an AI named Melvin. “It just seemed like the sketchiest thing in the world,” Katya says. She closed the tab. But a few weeks later, still unemployed, she got a message inviting her to apply to Mercor. This time, she looked up the company. Mercor, it seemed, sold data to train AI, and she was being recruited to create that data. “My job is gone because of ChatGPT, and I was being invited to train the model to do the worst version of it imaginable,” she says. The idea depressed her. But her financial situation was increasingly dire, and she had to find a new place to live in a hurry, so she turned on her webcam and said “hello” to Melvin.
It was a strange, if largely pleasant, experience. Manifesting on Katya’s laptop as a disembodied male voice, Melvin seemed to have actually read her résumé and asked specific questions about it. A few weeks later, Katya, who like most workers in this story asked to use a pseudonym out of fear of retaliation, received an email from Mercor offering her a job. If she accepted, she should sign the contract, submit to a background check, and install monitoring software onto her computer. She signed immediately.
She was added to a Slack channel, where it was clear she was entering a project already underway. Hundreds of people were busy writing examples of prompts someone might ask a chatbot, writing the chatbot’s ideal response to those prompts, then creating a detailed checklist of criteria t

zh.title: 你可能是下一个
zh.summary: Mercor通过与AI系统进行面试来招募失业工人创建AI训练数据，形成了一个矛盾现象：被AI取代的工人现在正在训练替代他们的系统。这一做法突显了在AI时代经济困顿如何剥削脆弱的工人。

fr.title: Vous pourriez être le prochain
fr.summary: Mercor recrute des travailleurs au chômage pour créer des données d'entraînement pour l'IA en menant des entretiens avec un système d'IA, créant un paradoxe où les travailleurs déplacés par l'IA entraînent désormais les systèmes qui les remplacent. Cette pratique met en évidence comment le désespoir économique exploite les travailleurs vulnérables à l'ère de l'IA.

de.title: Du könntest der Nächste sein

Die Praxis verdeutlicht, wie wirtschaftliche Verzweiflung verletzliche Arbeiter im KI-Zeitalter ausbeutet.

La práctica destaca cómo la desesperación económica explota a los trabajadores vulnerables en la era de la IA.

es.summary: La valoración de la plataforma de comercio electrónico y fintech uzbeka Uzum se ha disparado a $ 2.3 mil millones en siete meses, impulsada por un rápido crecimiento a 20 millones de usuarios y un volumen de pagos anuales de $ 11 mil millones. La empresa está consolidando su posición como un actor clave de fintech regional.

title: Apple now makes one in four iPhones in India: report
summary: Apple produced 55 million units in India last year, representing a significant shift in manufacturing as the company reduces dependence on China. This strategic relocation reflects growing geopolitical uncertainty and strengthens India's position as a major tech manufacturing hub.
content: Apple reportedly produced 55 million units in India last year, a shift accelerated as Apple faced growing uncertainty in China.

zh.title: 苹果现在在印度生产四分之一的iPhone：报告
zh.summary: 苹果去年在印度生产了5500万台，代表了制造业的重大转变，因为该公司减少了对中国的依赖。这一战略迁移反映了日益增长的地缘政治不确定性，并加强了印度作为主要科技制造中心的地位。

fr.title: Apple fabrique maintenant un quart de ses iPhones en Inde : rapport
fr.summary: Apple a produit 55 millions d'unités en Inde l'année dernière, représentant un changement significatif dans la fabrication alors que l'entreprise réduit sa dépendance envers la Chine. Cette relocalisation stratégique reflète une incertitude géopolitique croissante et renforce la position de l'Inde en tant que principal centre de fabrication technologique.

de.title: Apple fertigt jetzt ein Viertel seiner iPhones in Indien: Bericht
de.summary: Apple produzierte letztes Jahr 55 Millionen Einheiten in Indien, was einen bedeutenden Wandel in der Fertigung darstellt, da das Unternehmen seine Abhängigkeit von China verringert. Diese strategische Verlagerung spiegelt wachsende geopolitische Unsicherheit wider und stärkt Indiens Position als wichtiges Technologieherstellungszentrum.

es.title: Apple ahora fabrica una cuarta parte de sus iPhones en India: informe
es.summary: Apple produjo 55 millones de unidades en India el año pasado, representando un cambio significativo en la fabricación mientras la empresa reduce su dependencia de China. Esta reubicación estratégica refleja la incertidumbre geopolítica creciente y fortalece la posición de India como un centro importante de fabricación de tecnología.

title: Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs raises $1.03 billion to build world models
summary: AMI Labs, founded by Turing Prize winner Yann LeCun after departing Meta, has secured $1.03 billion in funding at a $3.5 billion pre-money valuation. The startup focuses on developing world models for advanced AI systems, demonstrating significant investor confidence in LeCun's vision.
content: AMI Labs, the new venture cofounded by Turing Prize winner Yann LeCun after he left Meta, has raised $1.03 billion at a $3.5 billion pre-money valuation.

zh.title: 杨立昆的AMI Labs获得10.3亿美元融资建立世界模型
zh.summary: 杨立昆奖得主杨立昆在离开Meta后创立的AMI Labs获得了10.3亿美元的融资，估值为35亿美元（融资前）。这家初创公司专注于为先进的人工智能系统开发世界模型，展示了投资者对杨立昆愿景的重大信心。

fr.title: AMI Labs de Yann LeCun lève 1,03 milliard de dollars pour construire des modèles mondiaux
fr.summary: AMI Labs, fondée par le lauréat du prix Turing Yann LeCun après son départ de Meta, a levé 1,03 milliard de dollars de financement à une valorisation pré-monnaie de 3,5 milliards de dollars. La startup se concentre sur le développement de modèles mondiaux pour les systèmes d'IA avancés, démontrant une confiance significative des investisseurs dans la vision de LeCun.

de.title: Yann LeCuns AMI Labs sammelt 1,03 Milliarden Dollar für die Erstellung von Weltmodellen
de.summary: AMI Labs, gegründet von Turing-Preisträger Yann LeCun nach seinem Weggang von Meta, hat 1,03 Milliarden Dollar an Finanzierung bei einer Pre-Money-Bewertung von 3,5 Milliarden Dollar gesichert. Das Startup konzentriert sich auf die Entwicklung von Weltmodellen für fortschrittliche KI-Systeme und zeigt großes Vertrauen der Investoren in LeCuns Vision.

es.title: AMI Labs de Yann LeCun recauda $1.03 mil millones para construir modelos mundiales
es.summary: AMI Labs, fundada por el ganador del Premio Turing Yann LeCun después de dejar Meta, ha asegurado $1.03 mil millones en financiamiento con una valoración previa al dinero de $3.5 mil millones. La startup se enfoca en desarrollar modelos mundiales para sistemas de IA avanzados, demostrando una confianza significativa de los inversores en la visión de LeCun.

title: An iPhone-hacking toolkit used by Russian spies likely came from U.S military contractor
summary: Google discovered iPhone hacking tools allegedly used by Russian espionage and Chinese cybercriminal groups, with U.S. defense contractor sources indicating the tools originated from their organization. The discovery raises concerns about security vulnerabilities and potential misuse of contractor-developed tools.
content: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S. government defense contractor said some of those hacking tools were theirs.

zh.title: 俄罗斯间谍使用的iPhone黑客工具包可能来自美国军事承包商
zh.summary: 谷歌发现了据称被俄罗斯间谍活动和中国网络犯罪团体使用的iPhone黑客工具，美国国防承包商消息人士表示这些工具来自其组织。这一发现引发了对安全漏洞和承包商开发工具可能被滥用的担忧。

fr.title: Une boîte à outils de piratage d'iPhone utilisée par des espions russes provenait probablement d'un entrepreneur militaire américain
fr.summary: Google a découvert des outils de piratage iPhone prétendument utilisés par l'espionnage russe et des groupes de cybercriminels chinois, avec des sources de l'entrepreneur de défense américain indiquant que les outils provenaient de leur organisation. La découverte soulève des préoccupations concernant les vulnérabilités de sécurité et l'abus potentiel d'outils développés par des entrepreneurs.

de.title: Ein iPhone-Hacking-Toolkit, das von russischen Spionen verwendet wurde, stammte wahrscheinlich von einem US-Militärunternehmer
de.summary: Google entdeckte iPhone-Hacking-Tools, die angeblich von russischer Spionage und chinesischen Cyberkriminalgruppen verwendet wurden, wobei US-Verteidigungsunternehmer-Quellen angaben, dass die Tools von ihrer Organisation stammen. Die Entdeckung wirft Bedenken hinsichtlich von Sicherheitslücken und des möglichen Missbrauchs von von Unternehmern entwickelten Tools auf.

es.title: Un kit de piratería de iPhone utilizado por espías rusos probablemente provino de un contratista militar estadounidense
es.summary: Google descubrió herramientas de piratería de iPhone presuntamente utilizadas por el espionaje ruso y grupos de ciberdelincuentes chinos, con fuentes del contratista de defensa estadounidense indicando que las herramientas provenían de su organización. El descubrimiento genera preocupaciones sobre vulnerabilidades de seguridad y posible mal uso de herramientas desarrolladas por contratistas.

title: Electric air taxi maker Archer hits back at Joby in countersuit alleging concealed Chinese ties
summary: Archer Aviation filed a countersuit against rival Joby, alleging concealed Chinese business ties following Joby's earlier corporate espionage lawsuit. The legal dispute reflects intensifying competition in the emerging electric air taxi market.
content: Archer's countersuit comes four months after Joby sued its rival for alleged 'corporate espionage.'

zh.title: 电动空中出租车制造商Archer反诉Joby隐瞒中国关系
zh.summary: Archer航空公司对竞争对手Joby提起反诉，指控其隐瞒中国商业关系，这是在Joby早前提起的企业间谍诉讼之后。这场法律纠纷反映了新兴电动空中出租车市场日益激烈的竞争。

fr.title: Le fabricant de taxis aériens électriques Archer contre-attaque Joby en intentant une contre-action pour liens chinois dissimulés
fr.summary: Archer Aviation a intenté une contre-action contre son rival Joby, alléguant des liens commerciaux chinois cachés suite à la précédente action en justice pour espionnage d'entreprise de Joby. Le différend juridique reflète l'intensification de la concurrence sur le marché émergent des taxis aériens électriques.

de.title: Elektro-Lufttaxi-Hersteller Archer schlägt zurück mit Gegenklage gegen Joby wegen verheimlichter chinesischer Verbindungen
de.summary: Archer Aviation reichte eine Gegenklage gegen seinen Konkurrenten Joby ein und warf diesem vor, chinesische Geschäftsbeziehungen zu verheimlichen, nachdem Joby zuvor eine Klage wegen Wirtschaftsspionage eingereicht hatte. Der Rechtsstreit spiegelt den verschärften Wettbewerb auf dem entstehenden Markt für Elektro-Lufttaxis wider.

es.title: El fabricante de taxis aéreos eléctricos Archer contraataca contra Joby con una demanda por vínculos chinos ocultos
es.summary: Archer Aviation presentó una demanda compensatoria contra su rival Joby, alegando vínculos comerciales chinos ocultos después de la demanda anterior de Joby por espionaje corporativo. La disputa legal refleja la intensificación de la competencia en el mercado emergente de taxis aéreos eléctricos.

title: Founders Fund nears $6B close for latest growth fund, sources say
summary: Founders Fund is approaching a $6 billion close for its latest growth fund, less than a year after closing a $4.6 billion vehicle. The new fund targets follow-on investments in the firm's successful late-stage portfolio companies.
content: The fresh fundraise comes less than a year after Founders Fund closed its third growth fund, a $4.6 billion vehicle intended primarily for follow-on investments in its successful late-stage companies.

zh.title: 创始人基金接近60亿美元最新成长基金交割
zh.summary: 创始人基金即将完成其最新成长基金60亿美元的交割，距该公司不到一年前完成的46亿美元融资不足一年。新基金针对该公司成功的后期投资组合公司的后续投资。

fr.title: Founders Fund approche de la clôture de 6 milliards de dollars pour son dernier fonds de croissance
fr.summary: Founders Fund approche de la clôture de 6 milliards de dollars pour son dernier fonds de croissance, moins d'un an après la clôture d'un véhicule de 4,6 milliards de dollars. Le nouveau fonds cible les investissements de suivi dans les sociétés de portefeuille de fin de cycle réussi de l'entreprise.

de.title: Founders Fund nähert sich dem Abschluss von 6 Milliarden Dollar für seinen neuesten Wachstumsfonds
de.summary: Founders Fund nähert sich dem Abschluss von 6 Milliarden Dollar für seinen neuesten Wachstumsfonds, weniger als ein Jahr nach dem Abschluss eines 4,6-Milliarden-Dollar-Fahrzeugs. Der neue Fonds zielt auf Follow-on-Investitionen in die erfolgreichen Spät-Stufen-Portfoliounternehmen des Unternehmens ab.

es.title: Founders Fund se acerca al cierre de 6 mil millones de dólares para su último fondo de crecimiento
es.summary: Founders Fund se acerca al cierre de 6 mil millones de dólares para su último fondo de crecimiento, menos de un año después de cerrar un vehículo de 4,6 mil millones de dólares. El nuevo fondo se orienta a inversiones de seguimiento en las empresas de cartera de etapa tardía exitosas de la empresa.
